description: Instruction paraphrases paired with each image at training time. Pure task prompts (leaf disease description); they carry NO disease knowledge and assert no symptom. The response text always comes verbatim from the frozen caption corpus.
instructions: Describe the visible condition of this tomato leaf.
What can you observe on this tomato leaf?
Examine this tomato leaf and describe any symptoms present.
Provide a diagnostic description of this tomato leaf.
Report the visible signs on this tomato leaf.
Describe what is shown on this tomato leaf image.
Assess this tomato leaf and summarize its visible symptoms.
Give a concise description of this tomato leaf's appearance.
